Description: Schema for reviewing and resolving invoice discrepancies.

inputs.name: VendorName
inputs.description: Name of the vendor associated with the invoice.

inputs.name: TotalInvoiceAmount
inputs.description: The total amount of the invoice.

inputs.name: TotalDiscrepancy
inputs.description: The calculated difference between the PO and invoice.

inputs.name: DiscrepancyDescription
inputs.description: Description of the discrepancy and recommendation by agent.

inputs.name: TotalPoAmount
inputs.description: The total amount of the purchase order (PO)

outputs.name: DecisionExplanation
outputs.description: Further explanation or comments regarding the final decision made.

outcomes.name: Approve
outcomes.description: Approve the resolution of the invoice discrepancy.

outcomes.name: Reject
outcomes.description: Reject the proposed resolution of the invoice discrepancy.

name: ActionSchema
